title: Teyvatcraft
description: A Minecraft mod inspired by the HoYoverse game "Genshin Impact."
body:
![Minecraft: Genshin Impact banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76032c214cf60e7816521a1a43a4802e66aec053.png)

[© All rights reserved by miHoYo. Other properties belong to their respective owners. ](https://www.hoyolab.com/article/143107)

This mod is still solidly in development and not yet very survival-friendly.

If you have any comments, suggestions, or bug reports, please add them to the curseforge page! (link at bottom) If you have a better way for me to receive them, please let me know. :)

[Please check out Genshin Impact for yourself!](https://genshin.hoyoverse.com/)
I am not affiliated with HoYoverse in any way--this is a fan-made project! Additionally, mod development will probably be pretty slow, so please be patient!

# Anemo Vision

**When the player has an anemo vision in their inventory, they gain access to anemo-related abilities:**

**High-Jump:**
- Toggled by a sticky keybind in the "Anemo" category 
- Charge for at least 1.5 seconds by sneaking, and then release to be launched several blocks into the air
- Must be on solid ground for this ability to charge
- Must charge for about 1.5 seconds consecutively

**Windfavored State:**

![Screenshot of Alex in the Windfavored State](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836fff6bab5db14dc8a2894b303dbcd0b1f9d797.png)
- Gives the player the power of creative flight
- Essentially a replica of the Wanderer's skill from Genshin Impact, even down to the visuals 
- Entering the "windfavored" state gives the player 150 kuugoryoku points to start
- Kuugoryoku points decrease over time
- Sprinting will increase your flying speed, but will double your kuugoryoku point consumption
- Pressing the jump key will cause the player to ascend, but will triple your kuugoryoku point consumption while the key is pressed
- Once the Windfavored state ends, the skill will enter a cooldown period of about 5 seconds, during which the player will be unable to enter the Windfavored state

# Cor Lapis
- Currently comes in shard and block form
- Cor Lapis shards are dropped by Cor Lapis clusters, which behave similarly to amethyst clusters
- Do not yet generate in the world naturally

[Visit Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/genshin)
